title: Binance to Revise Margin Collateral and Leverage Settings on Multiple Tokens
content: The exchange will adjust portfolio margin rates for LRC and QTUM, and update USDⓈ-M perpetual contract parameters for MONUSDT, MASKUSDT, and PEOPLEUSDT on Feb 27, 2026

title: Bitcoin Reaches New All-Time High
content: Bitcoin has surpassed $150,000 for the first time in history

title: Ethereum Upgrade Scheduled
content: Ethereum's next upgrade is scheduled for next month
